result: Do not cut acoustic body geometry until body/bore/tone-hole/drone-block DXF or CAD exports are present and revision-matched to Drone-Flutes-Design.xlsx.
Keep inlay-patterns DXFs decorative-only; they do not control tuning bore hole socket or breath-response geometry.
Record unison fifth-below and octave-below drone response for each member before claiming validated drone tuning.
Record onset pressure breath noise choking overblow and stable tone behavior after SAC/window/bird fit is built.
Verify 0.005 in drone-block slip fit clearance with calipers and go/no-go feel before batch machining all blocks.
Verify facet datum indexing and inlay pocket registration on scrap or first article before decorative inlay cutting.
